name: codex-monitor
description: Local read-only monitor for Codex Desktop context and token usage.

interface.shortDescription: Show Codex context and token usage in-window.
interface.longDescription: A local, read-only Codex Desktop monitor that reads session logs and injects a temporary overlay, sidebar hover panel, and per-response token chips through Chrome DevTools Protocol.
defaultPrompt: Show my latest Codex token usage.
